# Michael – Data Scientist, Dancer, Creative

## About
Michael is a Data Scientist, dancer, and creative. This site outlines his architecture ("Exocortex"), fundamental axioms, and his framework "Opus Purum".

## Sections
- [Hero Section](#hero): Introduction and high-level overview.
- [Opus Purum](#opus-purum): The Pure Working — an axiomatic framework for magic recast without myth or apparatus. Eight chapters: The One (ground structure), Axioms, The Divine, The Self, Mechanism of Effect, Sovereignty, Freedom, and Practice.
- [Exocortex](#exocortex): Infrastructure of Sovereignty, a local autonomous intelligence architecture.
- [Axioms](#axioms): Fundamental Architecture broken down into Cognition (formal axioms of cognitive systems), Being, and Doing.

For the full detailed content of all sections, see the full version:
[Full Content](llms-full.txt)
